scripts.sync:proyecto: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const p='scripts/sync-proyecto-static.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) { const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[p],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1); } console.log('[alamos] sync-proyecto-static.mjs no existe, omito.');"
scripts.build:animales: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); const p='scripts/build-animales.mjs'; if (fs.existsSync(p)) { const r=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,[p],{stdio:'inherit'}); process.exit(r.status ?? 1); } console.log('[alamos] build-animales.mjs no existe, omito.');"
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:proyecto && node scripts/generate-photos-manifest.mjs && node scripts/sync-team-animals-json.mjs
